text: I went to see the doctor for a consult on a service I thought would help me with an issue I’m having. She was very upfront about the fact that she didn’t think it would resolve , or at least get much benefit to the area of concern but was willing to treat it and add other areas in the deal . I realized that it just wasn’t a good fit for what I was hoping for . I’m  thankful she was so transparent about expectations. She also was able to have the surgeon speak to me about another option I had not seriously considered snd that was awesome .  I did end up going ahead and having my microbladed brows lasered ( tattoo removal) because I want to treat them differently. I will absolutely return to this business for the many services they offer . It was a great professional environment.
author: sharon gigliotti

text:
Great service from Marla, she does my pellets, botox and fillers. She makes sure she gives you exactly what you what.
Danielle is fabulous for facials and micro needling . I see a difference in my skin since starting my series of 3.
I strongly recommend Arivi for all your health and beauty needs.
The plastic surgeons are talented as well!
author: Cheryl Ciesla

text: Stopped in for the fist time to get Botox for my migraines. Emilie was amazing!
author: Theresa Rine

text: Danielle is absolutely fantastic! She’s professional, knowledgeable, and always makes the experience comfortable and easy. You can tell she really cares about her clients and takes pride in her work. I’ve had consistently great experiences with her and would highly recommend her to anyone looking for top-quality service!
author: Lucie Krausova

text: I have seen Marla, Emilie and Anastasia at this clinic.  They are excellent! Highly recommend!
author: Taghrid Altoos

text: I had a wart on my cheek since I was 12/13. I was very insecure about it. My parents didn’t see a need to get it removed because it was “non threatening”. However, I’m getting married  in a few weeks, and just didn’t want it there anymore. Marla and her crew took the best care of me. It was quick and painless. I feel confident and ready to take on the day. She also prescribed me something to help with my immune system.
author: jaisha nivens
